sections.title: Getting to the Church
sections.description: Divine Mercy Church is in Kelambakkam, approximately 40 km south of central Chennai via the OMR (Old Mahabalipuram Road). From Chennai Airport, expect 50–70 minutes depending on traffic. Ola, Uber, and auto-rickshaws are all readily available.

sections.title: Getting to the Beach Reception
sections.description: Blue Bay Beach Resort is on SH 49 (East Coast Road) just before Crocodile Park, Mahabalipuram — about 15 km from the church. The drive along ECR in the evening is beautiful. We recommend leaving no later than 5:30 PM to be settled in for the 6 PM reception.
sections.linkLabel: Directions to Blue Bay Beach Resort

sections.title: Recommended Hotels Nearby
sections.description: Several excellent stay options exist along the ECR corridor close to both venues. Radisson Blu Temple Bay Mahabalipuram and Chariot Beach Resort are within 5 km of the reception venue. For those preferring central Chennai, ITC Grand Chola and Taj Coromandel offer premium accommodation with easy highway access.

sections.title: Airport Transfers
sections.description: Chennai International Airport (MAA) is the closest airport, approximately 50–55 km from Blue Bay Beach Resort. Ola Outstation and Uber Intercity offer reliable pre-booked cabs. The drive takes 60–90 minutes depending on traffic. Book in advance for the 20th.

sections.title: Exploring the Coast
sections.description: If you are extending your stay, Mahabalipuram is a UNESCO World Heritage Site with stunning Shore Temples, rock-cut sculptures, and beautiful beaches. Five Rathas, Arjuna's Penance, and the Shore Temple are all within 10 minutes of the venue. The seafood along ECR is unmissable.

essentials.title: Government Hospital, Mahabalipuram
essentials.description: Approx 4 km from the venue. Open 24 hours. Emergency services available.

essentials.title: Apollo Pharmacy, Kelambakkam
essentials.description: Near the church. Open until midnight. Prescription and OTC medicines.

essentials.title: Mahabalipuram Police Station
essentials.description: Approx 3 km from the reception venue. Emergency: 100

essentials.title: ECR Bus Services
essentials.description: MTC buses run regularly along East Coast Road. Stop near the resort gate on SH 49.

essentials.title: Chennai International Airport (MAA)
essentials.description: Approx 50 km from the beach resort. Cab: 60–90 minutes via OMR/ECR.

essentials.title: Wedding Coordination Contact
essentials.description: Need help during your stay? Reach us at jason454a@gmail.com. Available from 8 AM to 10 PM.

faq.question: Which airport should we fly into?
faq.answer: Chennai International Airport (MAA) is your best option. It is approximately 50–55 km from the beach reception venue at Blue Bay Beach Resort, Mahabalipuram, and about 40 km from Divine Mercy Church in Kelambakkam.

faq.question: Is there transport between the church and the beach reception?
faq.answer: The two venues are approximately 15 km apart along the East Coast Road. We recommend making your own arrangements for the transfer between venues. Ola and Uber are available throughout, and the ECR drive at evening light is quite lovely.

faq.question: What is the dress code for the beach reception?
faq.answer: Coastal elegance. Think whites, creams, champagne, soft golds, and greens. Flowing fabrics work beautifully in the sea breeze. Heels are not recommended on the beach lawn — wedges and flats are perfect.

faq.question: Can children attend?
faq.answer: Children are warmly welcome at both the church ceremony and the beach reception. Please mention the number of little ones in your RSVP so we can make the right arrangements.

faq.question: What is the weather like in May?
faq.answer: May in Chennai is warm — expect 32–36°C during the day. Evenings on the beach are pleasant with a sea breeze. Light, breathable fabrics are highly recommended for both events.

faq.question: Is parking available?
faq.answer: Yes. Parking is available at both Divine Mercy Church and Blue Bay Beach Resort. Overflow parking is available near the resort gate.

arrivalTips: May evenings on the beach are warm but breezy — bring a light layer for the outdoor reception if you run cool.
East Coast Road (ECR) can get congested on Wednesday evenings. We recommend leaving the church by 5:30 PM at the latest for the reception.
Avoid stiletto heels for the beach lawn reception — wedges, block heels, or beautiful flats will serve you much better on sand.
Screenshot your personalised invitation link for quick check-in at both venues.
Explore Mahabalipuram if you arrive a day early — the Shore Temples at sunrise are extraordinary.
